clusters.label: Static Page Reloaders
clusters.description: This group exhibits minimal interaction, primarily characterized by long sessions on a single page with periodic reloads and little to no exploration or navigation.

clusters.label: Focused Young Urbanites
clusters.description: This group consists of young users from the United States who live in NYC and exhibit highly focused and linear navigation patterns with minimal exploration.
key_behaviors: Long session durations with periodic reloads

clusters.label: Young Urban Engager
clusters.description: This demographic consists mainly of young users from the United States who live in NYC and exhibit exploratory navigation patterns with focused bursts of engagement.
